title: Regenerate repo .codex/hooks.json fully from catalog + pin with drift assertion
action: Fix the drift found by cnr2-2: bee's own .codex/hooks.json is stale vs the catalog repo-target render — PreToolUse matcher missing AskUserQuestion, SubagentStart/Stop audit entries missing entirely. Regenerate the file THROUGH the catalog repo-target render (renderProjectionText for the codex runtime, repo target — pipe a node --input-type=module -e import to the file, preserving trailing-newline bytes; catalog.mjs is a pure module, this piped render is the sanctioned path). Preserve the cnr2-2 superset matcher (update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite must remain). Add a drift assertion row to hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs pinning the checked-in .codex/hooks.json byte-equal to the catalog repo-target render; remove any allowed-difference masking this file so the pin is real. Safety context (advisor finding 4): the added audits are silent/non-blocking and AskUserQuestion only denies confidently-malformed known schemas — safe to regenerate; note in the cell report that on live Codex the changed hook file may need one /hooks review-and-retrust and that live-firing proof needs a fresh session (synthetic contract rows are this cell's proof).

truths: .codex/hooks.json byte-equals the catalog repo-target render (drift assertion green)
AskUserQuestion present in the PreToolUse matcher; SubagentStart/Stop audit entries present
key_links: assertion renders from catalog at test time, not a stored snapshot
cell report notes the one-time /hooks retrust + fresh-session live-proof follow-up
prohibitions: No hand-written hook entries — everything comes from the catalog render
No changes to catalog.mjs entries themselves beyond what regeneration requires (expected: none)

verify: bash -c 'node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && grep -q "AskUserQuestion" .codex/hooks.json && grep -q "SubagentStart" .codex/hooks.json && grep -q "update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite" .codex/hooks.json && echo REGEN-OK'

trace.outcome: Regenerated .codex/hooks.json through the sanctioned catalog repo-target render (renderProjectionText(CODEX,{target:REPO}) piped via node --input-type=module), fixing the AskUserQuestion PreToolUse matcher gap and the missing SubagentStart/SubagentStop audit entries; added a byte-drift assertion row pinning the file to the render at test time (no stored snapshot, no allowed-difference mask) and registered it as required; superset state-sync matcher preserved; fixed the one pre-existing hardcoded 10-command route assertion to 12 to match the regenerated topology.
